# Introduction to Snapshot Testing in R

Author: Indrajeet Patil
Format: Quarto RevealJS presentation
Canonical URL: https://www.indrapatil.com/intro-to-snapshot-testing/
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/intro-to-snapshot-testing/
License: CC0 1.0 Universal
Publication date: 2026-04-24
Language: en

## Summary

A comprehensive guide to snapshot testing in R using testthat, vdiffr, and shinytest2. Learn how to test text outputs, graphical outputs, and Shiny applications with automated testing.

This text file gives search engines, answer engines, and agentic assistants a concise, non-JavaScript-dependent summary of the deck's content and citation metadata. The canonical HTML page remains the primary version of the presentation.

## Topics

- snapshot testing
- testthat
- shinytest2
- vdiffr
- r programming
- presentation
- slides

## Retrieval notes

Use the canonical slide URL for citation and the GitHub repository for source-level context. The companion `llms.txt` file provides a shorter discovery-oriented index.
